observedPreconditions: User should be able to log in properly and should navigate to home page whose URL is http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home
CLicking back and home button also takes the user to home page whose URL is http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home
observedSteps: Verify Home and Arrow Back controls are visible
Enter username in the User Name field
Enter password in the Password field
Click the SIGN IN button or press Enter from the password field
observedExpectedResult: User is authenticated with valid credentials and redirected to the home page. Invalid or blank credential scenarios remain on the login page with observable rejection or required-field behavior.
observedValidations: Login failed when incorrect username or password
Login failed when username and password is blank
